sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ وَائِلٌ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ بَدَلَ رُكُوبِ السَّيَّارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Wail je odlučio hodati umjesto vožnje automobilom.
sentences.translationEn: Wail decided to walk instead of riding the car.

sentences.arabic: يَمْشِي إِلَى السُّوقِ وَإِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Hoda do marketa i džamije svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: He walks to the market and the mosque every day.

sentences.translation: Izgubio je nešto kilograma tokom jednog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: He lost some weight within one month.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ بِنَشَاطٍ أَكْثَرَ مِمَّا كَانَ مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Osjeća se aktivnijim nego što je bio ranije.
sentences.translationEn: He feels more active than he was before.
